commit_scope: A Mixture of Experts whose GATE is a Form-native choice and whose EXPERTS are heterogeneous model KINDS, realizing M7's per-input serving shape. moe-router.fk composes proven cells: experts are learning-style-space rows (mesh = diffusion via gl-diffuse, attn = sparse attention via gl-attn-edges, conv = CNN, raw = memorizer), each trained into its own nearest-shape memory; the simple gate is recognition-router (fan every expert at one input, select the strongest, attributed); the reliable gate is a LEARNED gating network -- a nearest-shape memory over raw inputs -> the region's specialist, where the specialist is DISCOVERED by ls-best (the no-free-lunch research winner), never asserted. On a MIXED task no single inductive bias fits (a diffusion-shaped chart region + an attention-shaped perm region), every single expert tops out at 6/8 on the held-out test, but the learned gate routes each held-out input to its specialist and wins BOTH regions 8/8. The honest finding recorded in the band: raw confidence mis-routes on tiny data (an off-specialist can be confidently-correct and steal a region); the gating network that learns from the no-free-lunch research is what beats the single experts.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/transformer-numerics.fk form-stdlib/geometric-learning.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/learning-arc.fk form-stdlib/learning-style-space.fk form-stdlib/recognition-router.fk form-stdlib/moe-router.fk form-stdlib/tests/moe-router-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/transformer-numerics.fk form-stdlib/geometric-learning.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/learning-arc.fk form-stdlib/learning-style-space.fk form-stdlib/recognition-router.fk form-stdlib/moe-router.fk form-stdlib/tests/moe-compute-band.fk
local_validation.summary: moe-router-band -> 127 three-way (Go=Rust=TS), 0 divergent. moe-compute-band -> 63 three-way, 0 divergent: a COMPUTE expert kind whose core RUNS an executable recipe (the signed alternating fold a-b+c-d = alternating prefix sums) wins a region where the multiset/mean/max/local-structure are identical across classes so diffusion, attention, CNN, and the memorizer every score 0 -- only the computation separates it (compute 4, others 0); ls-best DISCOVERS compute; the three-kind MoE (diffusion+attention+compute) routes each held-out input to its specialist and scores 6/6, beating every single expert. ls-best DISCOVERS chart specialist=mesh (diffusion) and perm specialist=attn (sparse attention) -- crowned by the warmed no-free-lunch research, not asserted. The learned gate routes a held-out chart input -> mesh and a held-out perm input -> attn. MoE(learned gate) = 8/8 on the held-out mixed test; single mesh = 6/8, single attn = 6/8, single conv = 4/8, single raw = 4/8 -- the MoE strictly beats every single expert (32) and no single expert solves the mixed task (64), so per-input routing is necessary, not decorative. 3-KERNEL ONLY (Go=Rust=TS): composes the geometric-learning/learning-style-space/recognition-router family, which is not in form/fourth-arm-bands.txt (the gl-* graph-learning + warmed-fold op family is not yet flattened for fkwu). This is an unsupported-op-family gap, not a divergence.

known_limitations.limitation: The learned gate's specialist labels are discovered via ls-best on each region's research sub-task, which presumes the mixed task is composed of nameable regions (it is, here -- a chart sub-task and a perm sub-task). A fully unsupervised gate that discovers regions AND specialists from one unlabelled stream is not yet built; the simple confidence gate (recognition-router) routes unsupervised but mis-routes on tiny data, which the band records honestly.
known_limitations.follow_up: A gating network trained on a validation pass with a calibrated reliability signal (warmed generalization score per input region) is the next increment toward unsupervised routing.

known_limitations.limitation: Three expert KINDS exercised here (diffusion, attention, CNN, memorizer). The user's wider vision -- a compute expert that runs recipes, short-term (water) and long-term (ice) memory experts, a recipe-generating expert -- are further rows under the same open-set discipline (a new bias is an appended (id, pool, core) row, never an engine change), and champion-challenger flips serving authority between kinds on earned competition. Not built yet; named on the milestone map.
known_limitations.follow_up: Add the compute/memory/recipe expert rows and let the gate discover them; wire champion-challenger.fk for authority-flip between expert kinds.

known_limitations.limitation: 3-kernel only: the gl-* graph-learning cores and the warmed predict-then-learn fold are not in the fourth-arm manifest. Same honest floor as learning-style-space.fk itself. 0 divergent across Go/Rust/TS.
known_limitations.follow_up: The fourth arm gains this family when geometric-learning / learning-style-space are flattened for fkwu -- a separate manifest stone.

ci_validation.summary: validate.sh runs moe-router-band in the default suite via its preludes header; CI three-way gate applies.

deploy_validation.summary: Stdlib recipe + band + milestone-map doc; no route or service change. Rides normal merge.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: New capability: the body serves a Mixture of Experts where the gate is a Form-native choice and the experts are heterogeneous model kinds, and on a task no single bias fits, per-input routing beats every single expert -- with an attributed receipt of which kind wins where.
test_flows: validate.sh moe-router-band (three kernels agree, verdict 127): specialists discovered, gate routes, MoE 8/8 > best single 6/8, no single expert solves the mixed task
e2e_validation.summary: Proven three-way: a Form-native MoE gate over heterogeneous experts beats every single model on a mixed task.

phase_gate.gate: the auto-ml meta-learner's serving shape moves from per-task winner (learning-style-space) to per-input routing (MoE): a Form-native learned gate over heterogeneous model kinds beats every single expert on a mixed task, three-way
phase_gate.next: compute/memory/recipe expert kinds as appended rows; champion-challenger authority-flip between kinds; a fully unsupervised gating network
